title: waltheria marielleae
intro: Waltheria marielleae, also known as Waltheria, is a plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae and is native to Brazil. The medicinal properties of Waltheria marielleae lie in its leaves, roots, and stems, which are used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and fever. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antioxidant. Waltheria marielleae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used as a tincture or powder in traditional medicine.
